variables.name: Age
variables.description: Participant's age

variables.name: Censored
variables.description: For patients with TRUE value, PFS value represents time point when patient was lost to follow-up

variables.name: Data Freeze Included
variables.description: Sample was included in final Imielinski et al analysis

variables.name: Ethnicity
variables.description: Imputed ethnicity using principal component analysis on 1000-Genomes SNP data

variables.name: Histology
variables.description: Histological classification based on expert pathology re-review

variables.name: PFS
variables.description: Progression free survival measured as number of months until local or distant lung adenocarcinoma recurrence

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Unique participant identifier

variables.name: Smoking Pack Years
variables.description: Pack year quantification of participant at tumor resection.  Number of reported cigarette packs smoked per day x number of years of reported smoking

variables.name: Smoking Status
variables.description: Smoking status of participant at time of tumor resection

variables.name: Stage
variables.description: Stage at tumor resection

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Molecular analyte

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site of tissue collection

variables.name: OSH Diagnosis
variables.description: Outside hospital diagnosis as reported by the collaborator

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: De-identified sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Indicates the tumor / normal status of a sample

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. Array_SNP: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; Seq_DNA_WholeExome: Whole exome sequencing; Seq_DNA_WholeGenome: Whole genome sequencing

variables.description: Subject ID
